Ops reference (vm_stat, mount, kextstat diagnostic commands) — operator-facing prose, no behavior to test.
Ops reference (sudo purge, kern.maxvnodes tuning) — operator runbook, no behavior to test.
Config reference table (max_workers_total, read_rate_mb_per_sec) — configuration surface rather than a behavior contract.
Operator advisory about UBC pressure during scans — prose reference, no behavior to test.

Multi-filesystem (v0.18.0) overview prose — describes the resolve_capability resolver shared by transfer and scan. The behaviour itself is contract-tested under the multifs marker (tests/indexer/test_fs_capability.py, tests/dispatch/test_transfer_argv.py); this heading is the reference narrative.

Multi-filesystem (v0.18.0) reference — FsProbe mount consolidation and canonical_fs_type substring matching. Behaviour is covered by tests/indexer/test_fs_probe.py (multifs marker); this heading is reference prose.

Multi-filesystem (v0.18.0) reference table of per-FS knobs. Values are pinned by tests/indexer/test_fs_capability.py and tests/indexer/test_tier1_fs_aware.py (multifs marker); this heading is the human-readable table.

Multi-filesystem (v0.18.0) reference — the NTFS rsync flag prefix. Byte-identity is pinned by the golden test tests/dispatch/test_transfer_argv.py (multifs marker); this heading documents the flag list.

Multi-filesystem (v0.18.0) operator reference — DiskConfig.fs_type override snippet. The override-beats-probe behaviour is covered by tests/conf/test_disk_config_fs_type.py (multifs marker); this heading is config reference prose.
